name: Dutch Oven Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut carrots into 2-inch chunks.
2. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
3. In a large Dutch oven, season the pot roast with salt.
4. Melt shortening over medium heat in the Dutch oven.
5. Add the meat to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, turning once.
6. Reduce heat to low.
7. Pour barbecue sauce and apple cider vinegar over the meat.
8. Cover the Dutch oven and simmer on top of the range or in a 325°F oven for 3 to 4 hours.
9. Add carrots, potatoes, and onions about 1.5 hours before the end of cooking time.
10. Add okra 15 minutes before the cooking time is complete.
